title: Spectrum for Cobblemon
description: Bringing color to the Cobblemon universe! New colors for various Cobblemon to spice up their looks and bring more life to your world!
body:
⚠️ | Install this add-on both on the server as a datapack, and on the client as a resource pack. One file for both locations!

🌈  | Spectrum is a whole new addon intending to breathe a bit of color into your Cobblemon world. Named after the color spectrum, this addon adds 9 new colors for each "segment" of color on supported Cobblemon!
The segments of color are categorized as following, going from biggest to smallest;
- Primary (like the brown of Eevee)
- Secondary (like the tan of Eevee)
- Tertiary (like the eyes of Flareon)
- Quaternary (like the frill of Vaporeon)

🔴 | Currently, these Cobblemon support Spectrum colors;
- All Eeveelutions, Ditto
- Mewtwo, Mew, Rayquaza
- Lapras, Spiritomb, Pachirisu, Emolga
- Growlithe, Arcanine, Rattata, Raticate
- Raygul from the Baby Legends addon (compatibility)

❓ | FAQ
- Are shinies supported?

Shinies are not yet supported. Spectrum will assign colors to shiny Cobblemon, but there is currently no means of telling whether a colored Cobblemon is shiny or not. I highly recommend getting the "Shinier Shinies" add-on to help with this until this is implemented.

- Can I add this into my pack? Make a video on this?

Go for it! Credit would be nice though :)
